author: Ryan Law
title: AI Content Wasn't Good Enough. Now It Is.
content:
The common belief is that AI-generated blog posts are inherently low-quality compared to human-made content. Companies scaling AI content do so with the understanding they are trading quality for speed and scale, though they're aware they're sacrificing something important.

However, the title suggests that AI-generated content has improved significantly, and is no longer necessarily inferior to human-written content. This article discusses the evolving quality and capabilities of AI-generated content in the context of SEO and content marketing strategies.
